AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED INCORRECTLY AS BRUNDAG, JON TO BE BRUNDAGE, JON

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRUNDAGE, JON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 411 O'FARRELL STREET #505 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL AUG-31-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, PLAINTIFF WAIVES ALL PAST DUE RENT AND DAILY DAMAGES IF DEFENDANT VACATES BY 8/31/93 5:00 P.M. IF NOT, PLAINTIFF TO HAVE JUDGMENT FOR UNPAID BACK RENT OF $275.00 AND $9.17 PER DIEM FROM 7/15/93 TO 8/31/93 AND COST OF $80.00. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR OTHER TERMS.
